main.name: Mehbuba Abera
main.description: Senior Odoo Developer | ERP Customization & Implementation Specialist | Backend Architect
main.bio: Odoo-focused Software Developer with hands-on experience in ERP customization, implementation, and optimization across Odoo Community and Enterprise (Odoo.sh). I specialize in delivering practical ERP solutions, debugging complex production issues, and aligning systems with real business workflows. With a strong background in Python, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, I bring both technical execution and team leadership to every project.
main.contactmessage: I'm always open to discussing new ERP implementations, custom Odoo modules, or technical leadership opportunities.

resume.skillmessage: Specialized in Python-based Odoo frameworks, full-stack Node.js development, and large-scale ERP architecture.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

work.title: Senior Odoo Developer
work.description: Customizing Odoo Community and Enterprise (Odoo.sh) modules focusing on finance, inventory, purchasing, and landed cost workflows. Implementing payment request workflows with multi-level approval logic and managing CI/CD pipelines.

work.title: Acting Software Head
work.description: Led Odoo ERP implementation across Accounting, Purchasing, Inventory, HR, and Sales CRM. Mentored developers and oversaw architecture combining Odoo with Node.js services, Docker, Consul, and PostgreSQL.

work.title: Software Developer
work.description: Customized and implemented Odoo modules across HR and Finance. Developed backend services using Node.js and PostgreSQL. Built workflow automation systems for leave requests and asset transfers.

projects.title: Foreign & Local Procurement
projects.category: Comprehensive Odoo workflow automation for global sourcing, dynamic vendor management, and multi-currency landed cost tracking.

projects.title: Sales & Export Management
projects.category: End-to-end sales pipelines customized for international trade, automated export documentation, and comprehensive logistics tracking.

projects.title: Workshop Management
projects.category: Equipment lifecycle tracking, digitized job cards, predictive maintenance scheduling, and dynamic resource allocation within Odoo.

projects.title: Accounting & HR Management
projects.category: Unified financial reporting, localized payroll automation, multi-level approval systems, and complete employee lifecycle management.

projects.title: Advanced Integrations & Microservices
projects.category: Built robust microservices architecture for Odoo, integrating hardware POS machines and setting up automated Email/SMS notification gateways.

projects.title: Asset & Attendance Systems
projects.category: Streamlined internal HR operations with biometric attendance integrations and deployed comprehensive asset lifecycle management tracking.
